summary:
CHURCH EXPERIENCE AND HEAVENLY VISION: Brandon recounts attending an impactful church service at the Hiding Place in Collinsville, Oklahoma, where he and his family experienced a profound spiritual atmosphere. While sitting in the back row during worship, Brandon describes having an open-eyed vision in which Jesus appeared directly in front of him, smiling and observing the service. Brandon then saw a beautiful crown adorned with rubies, diamonds, and black onyx stones. When Brandon initially thought the black onyx seemed dark or evil, Jesus explicitly told him that He created all colors richly for enjoyment and that the black onyx was made by Him. Jesus explained that every believer receives a uniquely designed personal crown in heaven. Wanting to honor the King of Kings with a gift similar to the wise men, Brandon picked up the crown in the Spirit and handed it to Jesus, mirroring the biblical concept of casting down golden crowns.

WAVES OF GLORY AND DIVINE REFRESHING: Brandon shares that Jesus spoke to him about bringing a refreshing to His people who are thirsty for living water. In the vision, Brandon observed waves of God's presence rolling across the front of the church, glowing with beautiful pink sunset colors. Jesus stated that these waves would bring a continual refreshing over the remnant and those seeking Him. Brandon relays this message to encourage individuals who are feeling dry, burned out, or desperate due to struggles with sickness, depression, anxiety, or life pressures, affirming that Jesus wants to become a fresh drink of living water for them.

PRESENT FAITH AND HEALING DECLARATIONS: Brandon discusses the importance of exercising faith for immediate miracles rather than pushing expectations into the future. Referencing his own hopes for his daughter Megan's manifestation of healing, Brandon explains that faith calls things into existence in the present moment, citing the biblical example of Abraham. Brandon then issues declarations of healing and deliverance over various ailments, including addictions, cancer, diabetes, heart disease, and lung disease. He commands satanic strongholds and the spirit of depression to break, specifically declaring normal serotonin and dopamine levels, proper hormonal alignment, and correct brain function.

THE POWER OF SPOKEN WORDS AND BLESSINGS: Brandon emphasizes that life and death are in the power of the tongue, teaching that individuals dictate their circumstances and future through their spoken words. He warns against speaking negativity or accepting word curses from others, noting that such curses act like a boomerang when countered by faith. Brandon encourages the practice of verbally declaring blessings, divine protection, and prosperity over one's life, finances, and household. He insists on the necessity of cultivating a bulldog determination to continuously speak positive, scriptural truths to shift difficult circumstances, just as a large ship gradually turns.
rawData: [September 13, 2024]-[I saw Jesus in a vision - God is bringing waves of refreshing to His people who are dry and thirsty]-[https://youtu.be/IZoMO73kySw]-[Good morning family. How are y'all doing today? I'm excited to be with you. I have some things on my heart to talk to you about. I went to a church service last night and it was amazing—exactly what I'm looking for. The Spirit of the Lord moved, and the presence of the Lord was so amazing. The atmosphere was charged with His glory. I just want to tell you about it a little bit. My son went and he got a touch from the Lord. My wife—we all were blessed. We were blessed by this church service. It's nice to just go in there and get to drink, get refreshed. It was just awesome. I know there's many more to come. Collinsville, Oklahoma is the Hiding Place; I'm telling y'all, Jesus is doing something huge at Collinsville, Oklahoma. I'm just human. Like I said, I'm just real with you. I've got issues and I work through them. We work out our salvation with fear and trembling. I try every single day to walk the best I can. I'm hungry and thirsty just like everybody else. I sit in the back and I just want to be a sponge. I sit in the very back row a lot of times and I just watch and see if I see any angelics or angelic visitations. I don't go to the front; a lot of times I like to see if there's ministering spirits coming in to bless the congregation, because that's what happens a lot. In this case, I was just worshiping because the worship was phenomenal. The glory of the Lord came in with the worship. I was sitting in the back, like I said, and I had my head down and all of a sudden Jesus appeared to me in an open-eyed vision. He came to me and he was this close—this close to me. He was just observing me, but he was smiling; he had a huge smile on his face, like he was laughing, and he was just enjoying the service. He was looking down at me. He never spoke, but all of a sudden I was in the Spirit. I looked down and I saw a crown—a beautiful crown full of rubies. It had diamonds all around this onyx-looking stone. My first initial thought was, 'Wow, onyx is dark. It's a black stone. That's kind of evil.' But the Lord heard my thoughts and He spoke to me. He said, 'Brandon, I created all colors. I created everything richly for you to enjoy, son. Black onyx—I made that stone; it's here from Me.' I was blessed by what He said because it changed my opinion about black onyx stone. I was looking at this crown, but standing in front of the King of Kings, my heart instantaneously was like, 'Oh, I want to give You something. I want to honor You with something.' I looked down and I didn't have anything on me other than just me. I thought I'd just give Him me, but I was like, 'I want to give more' because I'm standing in front of the King of Kings. In the vision, I picked up that beautiful crown. It had diamonds wrapped around each one of those onyx stones, and there were humongous diamonds all on this. He said, 'This is your personal crown. Every one of my children will have a crown—your personal crown—when they come to heaven.' It was beautiful; there were all kinds of cool things in that crown. He told me He had a crown that's designed for each individual believer; it's made special for them with the jewels, and everything represents something. I picked up that crown and all I could do was worship Him with it by giving it to Him. I took that crown in the Spirit and I handed it over to Him. I was just like, 'I just want to give You an offering. I just want to give You something special.' When you're entering into the presence of a king, I wanted to bring Him a gift like the wise men brought Him gold, myrrh, and frankincense. They brought Him the gifts because they were worshiping Him with them. I thought it was so beautiful. I was casting down the golden crowns there. I picked it up in the Spirit, in the open-eyed vision, and I handed it to Him. That scripture, 'casting down the golden crowns'—I didn't have the whole scripture of it, but I know it's in Revelation, I believe. It just echoed inside of me, and I blessed Him with it. All He did was just smile with this love on His face. It was such an honor. He received from me, but I was like, 'I have nothing of my own to give You, Lord, other than just me.' But I gave Him a gift out of something that He blessed me with. Then He spoke to me and said, 'Brandon, I'm bringing a refreshing to my people. They're thirsty.' There's many of you watching this video today that are thirsty for a fresh drink of that living water. At this moment, waves of His glory in that vision—whenever I looked over and across the front of the church—there were waves of His glory, waves of His presence rolling in. I could see a beautiful pink, like a sunset, with all kinds of beautiful pink colors. The waves, when they were coming in, looked like they were glowing with this pink sunset color. They were coming over the people and bringing a refreshing. The Lord said, 'I'm going to bring a refreshing over my remnant, over my people that are seeking Me.' I could see the waves coming in, and He said, 'As that wave comes in, I'm going to bring another one right on the heels of it.' In these last days, if you stay close to the vine, if you abide in Me and My words remain in you, a continual refreshing... you shall ask what you will and it shall be done. He said, 'I'm bringing a wave of my glory upon my people—a wave of refreshing, a continual refreshing—by drinking from that cup.' When I talk about 'Fill my cup, Lord, I lift it up, Lord, come and quench,' that's what I'm talking about—drinking from that river of living water. He said out of your belly shall flow rivers of living water. I'm telling you, there's a river of living water that's going to start to bubble out of you as you stay close to Him and you seek Him daily. He's going to bring a refreshing over you. So I'm going to believe God with you today for a fresh drink of that water. Jesus wants to become real to those in a place of desperation—those who are so hungry and thirsty and desperate for Him to touch you in a mighty way. I'm telling you, Jesus wants to become real to you and become that fresh drink for you so that you're not dry and you're not burned out. There's a lot of you that are wanting to give up on things—wanting to give up on ministry, your marriage, your children, your jobs, whatever—saying, 'I can't take the pressure anymore; this has become too hard to keep going through.' The Lord wants to give you a fresh touch today. He told me, 'Brandon, I want to give my people a drink.' There's a lot of you in that desperation of saying, 'Hey, I've been battling this sickness, this disease, this depression, anxiety, or fear. How can I get through this? I can't go anymore.' You keep rehearsing it: 'God, where are You? How can I get through this?' But I'm telling you, the Lord told me last night, 'I want to bring a fresh touch on my people,' and He wants to bring it now. I was sitting there, and like I said, I deal with my own things. I was believing maybe next service I'll get my breakthrough for what I'm believing for—for my daughter, Megan. Maybe next time I'm in church, maybe Megan will get her full manifestation. Maybe I'll get my full manifestation of things that I'm believing for. The Lord stopped me in that same vision, in that same experience, and said, 'Brandon, why not now? Why do you always push off the miracle for tomorrow when I'm ready to do it now?' Faith calls those things that be not as though they are—right now. Why do I always push off the miracle? Faith calls it now. The Lord's not always telling you it's tomorrow—that in the 'sweet by and by' you're going to get it. Receive it now. Abraham staggered not at the promise of God through unbelief, but he was strong in faith, believing and fully persuaded that what God had promised, He was able also to perform it. I want you to believe right now in your circumstances for your 'now.' Now faith is the substance of things hoped for and evidence of things not seen. 'Now' is the things you're believing for—not tomorrow, not next service, not when you get around another healing minister. Believe for your manifestation today. I'm always having thoughts like, 'Maybe next time, maybe a year from now, maybe my breakthrough will come.' You're always kicking that can down the road that God's going to do something. But we're going to believe God for today for your miracle. We're going to believe God today for your fresh touch—for a drink that will fill your cup because you're lifting it up and quench the thirsting of your soul. I believe with all my heart Jesus is the restorer of all things, that nothing is impossible for Him. Whatever you put your hands to will prosper. Whatever you touch will be blessed because you're a child of the King. Greater is He that is in you than he that is in the world. A thousand shall fall at your side and ten thousand at your right hand, but nothing shall come nigh. I believe with all my heart Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory from sickness and disease, from bondage, from addictions. It doesn't matter what you're going through; there's nothing too hard that Jesus can't set you free from. I believe today is your day. Today is your day for your miracle. So let's believe right now together. Whatever you're believing for, no matter how big it may seem in your mind, Jesus knows what you need. I'll come in agreement with you and believe for your manifestation. Father, I thank You for every need. I come in agreement with these people right now. We are healed now. Nothing's too big, nothing's too small. Jesus, I thank You that You said by Your stripes we are healed. We call them healed now—not tomorrow, not the next day—but now. We call them healed now in Jesus' name. We receive healing over every single circumstance—healing and deliverance from addictions, sickness, disease, cancer, diabetes, heart disease, lung disease. Jesus paid the price for you to be healed. We call you healed and whole and well in the name of Jesus. Now, Satan, take your hands off of God's property! We command you to release them now in Jesus' name. We break Strait satanic strongholds. We break addictions. We command them to be broken by Your power, by the blood that set us free. Whom the Son has set free is free indeed. I command healing, wholeness, and wellness over them in the name of Jesus. We thank You, Lord, that no bondage is on them from the top of their head to the soles of their feet. Now faith is the substance of things hoped for and evidence of things not seen. We call you healed now in Jesus' name. Faith calls those things that be not as though they were. We call you healed, well, and delivered. We call your marriages restored, healed, and whole. We call for a refreshing over the children, a fresh drink of Your living water over them. Father, let them realize that You're good and Your mercy endures forever. Great is Your faithfulness to them, O God. Nothing's too big for You to handle. Father, I thank You for Your mercy. I thank You that Your mercies are new every morning. They may think, 'I'm an old wretched sinner just saved by grace,' but Father, I thank You that You've saved them and delivered them. Give them a confidence of who they are in Christ Jesus. Let the eyes of their understanding be enlightened that they would know the hope of Your calling. Father, I thank You that they are not beat down with sin anymore; they are set free by Your blood and by the word of their testimony. I thank You, Holy Spirit, that You're ministering to them right now, showing them how special they really are. Jesus, You paid the price for them for love, joy, and peace. You said, 'Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you.' Your Shalom peace. We receive that peace that passes all understanding by faith over our households. We receive joy—joy unspeakable and full of Your glory. We take authority over the spirit of depression right now in the name of Jesus. I command it to break off of them. We call the serotonin levels to be normal. We call their dopamine levels to be normal. We call their hormones to line up in their body. I call their brain to function like it's supposed to and fire like it's supposed to. Be whole, be healed, be well in Jesus' name. We speak to the serotonin levels to be normal in the large and small intestine. You said, 'Be anxious for nothing.' Take the care out of your prayer; we will take no care. Not only do we take the care out of our prayer, but Father, we are yielded and grounded in love because we realize my Father loves me. If my Father loves me, He's got me. He's protecting me. My Father loves me. Just practice that today; say it all day: 'My Father loves me.' You may feel like you're too far gone, but I'm telling you, perfect love casts out all fear. Get that love down inside of you. Say that all day: 'My Father loves me. Jesus loves me.' You've got to speak to your mountain. Your mountain has to hear your voice. Your voice has an address in the spirit realm. You've got to decree that out of your mouth, and you speak to your circumstances and they will change. I say it all the time: 'I am anointed to prosper. I have the ability to get wealth—not just to hoard it, but to be a blessing to others.' My Father has the cattle on a thousand hills. I speak blessing and increase over my finances. I have a supernatural ability to create wealth for my home. I say it all the time. The Lord is my shepherd, I shall not want. He leads me beside still waters. I will lack no good thing. I'm a tither, and I have tithers' rights. The blessing is on my house, the blessing is on my dogs, the blessing is on whatever I put my hands to. He said whatever I put my hands to prospers. We prosper in everything. We will be the head and not the tail, above and not beneath. You've got to start saying those things. You've got to believe it and quote that out of your mouth. It might not happen overnight, but faith calls those things that be not as though they were. You keep speaking to it and you're going to see that ship turn around. A big cruise ship takes a long time to turn, but you're going to turn that boat around—and it's not going to sink like the Titanic. You are going to change your circumstances by what you say out of your mouth. Life and death are in the power of your tongue. What you've been saying out of your mouth is what you're living today and what you're going to live tomorrow. But you start speaking good things. Life and death are in the power of your tongue—not in mine, in yours. That means you have the ability to create life or death with your words. You might be speaking all kinds of bad things: 'My husband's no good; he's a drunk, his daddy was a drunk, and he's always going to be a drunk.' Or 'They're always going to be on drugs.' What are you saying out of your mouth? 'I'm never going to be healed, never going to be free.' That's what you're going to have because you are speaking into your life and reaping what you're sowing. You've got to sow good things and you're going to start seeing good things in your life. Most people don't want to hear that, but you are a product of what you've said over the years or what somebody has spoken over you. Some people have been living under word curses. You've got to speak to those word curses and say, 'I condemn those words. You won't curse me.' Every tongue that rises against me, I condemn it; they fall to the ground. I will not allow that word to bear fruit in my life. You will not curse me with your mouth. Word curses, witches, warlocks—it goes back on you like a boomerang. It doesn't come on me. I'm blessed. You can't curse whom God has blessed. I walk in the blessing and the favor of the Lord. My children and my wife walk in the favor of the Lord. You have to realize who you are. Jesus loves you and He doesn't want any bad to come on you. You've got to change those things, and the Holy Spirit will help you. It took me a bulldog determination on a bone—I'm not letting go. I'm going to walk in the blessing, walk in healing, and walk in deliverance. I've gone too long. Let me close. I could talk like this all day—it's in me. This is the way we live. Put a smile on your face. Please subscribe to my channel if you're still watching. Comment down below; tell us where you're watching from. I'm curious where everybody is. Don't tell us your street address—just the state or country. I like to see where people are getting blessed. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much, and we love you. We will see you all next time. God bless you all, bye-bye.]
